tagline: Designing reliable Control-M operations, automation, and AI-assisted support systems.
description: Control-M SME and production support specialist with 15+ years across banking, enterprise workload automation, ITSM, RPA, and AI-assisted operations.

roles.detailed: Control-M SME | Production L3 Support | Agentic AI Automation

bio: IT professional with 15+ years of experience in Control-M administration, batch workflow design, production support, infrastructure management, automation, and ITIL-led service delivery. Currently supporting enterprise Control-M customers at BMC Software, with deep experience across banking environments, Unix/Linux and Windows platforms, shell scripting, Python, SQL, VBA, UiPath RPA, REST APIs, and AI-assisted support tooling.

experience.company: BMC Software Asia Pacific Pte Ltd
bullets: Provide Level 2 and Level 3 technical support for Control-M across enterprise Linux, Unix, and Windows environments.
Advise global customers on Control-M architecture, workload optimization, upgrades, migrations, compatibility, and operational best practices.
Perform RCA, reproduce customer issues in lab environments, validate fixes, manage escalations to R&D, and publish knowledge articles and videos.
Built AI-powered Control-M Log Analyzer and Salesforce case follow-up automation to reduce manual investigation and improve support response time.
experience.desc: Enterprise Control-M technical support, architecture advisory, RCA, escalation management, upgrade planning, and AI-assisted automation for global customers.

bullets: Supported Operations & Technology Control-M administration, scheduling, production support, and batch workflow management.
Automated manual activities using VB scripting, VBA macros, batch scripts, Unix shell scripts, and SQL to improve operational efficiency.
Implemented LDAP authentication for Control-M access and supported upgrades, migrations, HA setup, DR checks, and production changes.
Handled incidents, problems, and changes through Remedy, Jira, and ServiceNow while coordinating with application, infrastructure, and business teams.
experience.desc: Control-M SME support for banking operations, automation, access management, batch execution, DR verification, and ITIL-aligned service delivery.

bullets: Delivered end-to-end UiPath automation solutions for banking operations, reducing manual processing across multiple business processes.
Gathered requirements with stakeholders and authored BRD, PDD, and SDD documentation for automation delivery.
Designed workflows with exception handling, screen scraping, data scraping, CSV/Excel outputs, and reliable bot scheduling through UiPath Orchestrator.
experience.desc: RPA delivery and business analysis for card operations, billing, merchant payment processes, and production automation workflows.

bullets: Provided end-to-end production support for Control-M failures, workflow development, server management, environment changes, and upgrades.
Managed Control-M/EM components, agents, calendars, dependencies, post-processing alerts, urgent changes, and weekend implementation roadmaps.
Worked with teams on RCA, proactive batch cycle analysis, SLA adherence, and production incident reduction across Unix, Windows, and T24 workflows.
experience.desc: Production support and Control-M administration for banking operations, change delivery, workflow design, and incident resolution.

projects.title: Log Analyzer
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered RCA Assistant
projects.desc: Designed and developed an LLM-powered support tool that analyzes Control-M logs, extracts structured insights from unstructured data, and surfaces probable root causes with actionable troubleshooting steps.

projects.title: Case Follow-Up Automation
projects.subtitle: AI-Driven Support Workflow
projects.desc: Built a Python-based automation system to monitor support cases and trigger intelligent follow-up emails, improving response time, reducing manual effort, and strengthening SLA compliance.

publications.title: Control-M Log Analyzer
publications.desc: An AI-powered log analysis prototype for Control-M support, using LLM workflows to detect likely root causes and generate troubleshooting guidance.

publications.title: AI-Driven Salesforce Case Follow-Up
publications.desc: A support automation concept using Python and AI-assisted monitoring to improve follow-up discipline, response speed, and SLA adherence.

publications.title: Enterprise Control-M Advisory
publications.desc: Architecture, sizing, upgrade planning, migration support, compatibility guidance, RCA, and runbook validation for Control-M environments.

publications.title: RPA & Process Documentation
publications.desc: Business analysis, PDD and SDD creation, UiPath workflow delivery, and production-ready automation design for banking operations.
